summary: Phase 12 handoff verification for CCMS claims pipeline — PASS end-to-end. Backend: test_claims_queue_v2.py 8/8 PASS including the new test_queue_v2_billed_totals_are_real_and_filter_aware (validates per-tab billed_totals dict has same keys as tab_counts, non-negative ints, all >= named tabs, zeroes under bogus payer_id, and >= seeded billed_cents under real payer_id). Phase 11 assignment/RBAC suite 14/14 PASS (test_assignment_rbac_phase11.py) — unassigned=true filter correctly restricts rows to assigned_to absent/None. Claims queue Phase 2b suite 6/6 PASS, Billing Phase 9 (+ non-admin) 8/8 PASS. Broader billing regression (phase3/5/5_denial/6) 62/65 PASS with only the 3 known pre-existing flakes (test_run_rules_clean_claim, test_statement_body_deterministic, test_email_mock_path_when_no_key) — explicitly pre-flagged in handoff note and not caused by Phase 12 work. Frontend: /billing/claims renders claims-queue-tabs with four tabs each wired to tab-billed-total BilledChip (tab-all $87,700/1687, tab-pending-submission $21,282/410, tab-rejected $14,040/286, tab-follow-up $5,815/112). Assignee filter exposes 'Unassigned only' option via data-testid claims-assignee-filter-unassigned — selecting it sends unassigned=true, restricts rows to 25 unassigned rows all showing italic 'Unassigned' assignee label, and updates summary ($82,370 of 1587) + tab-all totals consistently (filter-aware). Follow-up/aging badges wired via data-testid claim-row-followup-<id> and claim-row-aging-<id> — zero instances rendered on seed data because all rows are service_date=2026-04-22 (today, aging_days=0) and none carry followup_flag=true; conditional render logic verified present in ClaimsQueue.jsx L409-423. No defects found.
critical_code_review_comments: router.py L4435-4455: per-tab billed_totals loop correctly reuses _tab_base_query + _apply_filters so every tab aggregate respects the active payer_id / status / assignee / unassigned / age_days filters — no divergence between tab_counts and billed_totals. Small perf note: this issues N aggregates (one per _TAB_KEYS entry) per queue fetch; acceptable at current scale (~1.6k claims, <50ms observed) but could be folded into a single $facet aggregate if tab count grows.

router.py L4438-4440: noop guard (tb is None or tb.get('__noop__')) correctly zeroes both count and billed for tabs that cannot match under current filter — matches the requirement that bogus payer_id zeroes every billed_totals entry.

ClaimsQueue.jsx BilledChip (L276-283) accepts cents and renders via shared currency formatter; data-testid='tab-billed-total' is consistent across all four tabs so automation can collect them uniformly.

ClaimsQueue.jsx L546 and L567: duplicate data-testid 'claims-assignee-filter-unassigned' appears in both desktop + mobile filter layouts. Test selectors should use .first() or be scoped — I did so in the Playwright run; not a defect since both are legitimate render branches.
useClaims.js L294: `if (filters.unassigned) params.unassigned = true;` — only forwards when truthy, matches backend boolean Query default. Works with Phase 11 backend semantics.

success_rate.backend: 100% on Phase 12 scope (8/8 claims_queue_v2 + 14/14 assignment_rbac_phase11 + 6/6 claims_queue_phase2b + 8/8 billing_phase9/phase9_nonadmin). 62/65 on broader billing regression — 3 pre-existing flakes are not Phase 12 regressions.
success_rate.frontend: 100% on Phase 12 scope — all required data-testids present and wired; billed_totals render per-tab; unassigned filter sends correct param and restricts rows; italic Unassigned label renders on empty-assignee rows.

test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 — working. Claims queue page triggers a reauth modal; used 'Use password instead' link + same password to unlock.
seed_data_creation: test_queue_v2_billed_totals_are_real_and_filter_aware creates one seeded payer + patient + policy + claim (billed_cents=7700) per invocation to assert filter-aware positive path. No cleanup required; test uses uuid4 suffixes to avoid collisions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 ships clean. Backend billed_totals dict is real and filter-aware (validated with bogus-payer-zeroes + real-payer-positive assertions). Frontend tabs show per-tab billed totals via tab-billed-total testid; Unassigned-only filter + italic Unassigned label both working. Follow-up/aging badges are wired but not visible on current seed data because all seeded claims are from today (aging_days=0) and none have followup_flag=true. To exercise those visual badges in a future test, directly mutate a seeded claim via Mongo: set followup_flag=true OR backdate service_date_from by >30d, then reload /billing/claims and assert data-testid claim-row-followup-<id> / claim-row-aging-<id>.
